PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 120; Write-Output "GET / -> $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; $env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; npx tsc --noEmit; Write-Output "tsc exit: $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; Write-Output "GET / -> $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; if \($resp.Content -match 'InfernoSection'\) { Write-Output 'STALE REFERENCE FOUND' } else { Write-Output 'no stale reference in HTML' })

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; python -c "from pypdf import PdfReader; r = PdfReader\(r'C:\\Users\\adarsh laptop\\Downloads\\AI_3D_Animated_Websites_Workflow.pdf'\); print\('PAGES:', len\(r.pages\)\); [print\(p.extract_text\(\)\) for p in r.pages]")

PowerShell(foreach \($r in @\('/', '/legacy'\)\) { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$r" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 120; Write-Output "$r -> $\($resp.StatusCode\)" }; $env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; npx tsc --noEmit; Write-Output "tsc exit: $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/legacy" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60\).Content; foreach \($t in @\('NEXUS','ODYZEA','PYXIS','EQUINOX','APRICITY','the core where all connections meet','mariner'\)\) { if \($html -match [regex]::Escape\($t\)\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $t" } else { Write-Output "MISSING: $t" } })

PowerShell(foreach \($r in @\('/', '/legacy', '/editions/nexus_2024.png', '/speakers/vineet_patawari.png'\)\) { try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$r" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 120; Write-Output "$r -> $\($resp.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "$r -> FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } }; $env:Path = "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;" + $env:Path; npx tsc --noEmit; Write-Output "tsc exit: $LASTEXITCODE")
